ecommerceSettings.title: E-commerce Settings

specifications.title: Category filter values
specifications.subtitle: Unique product specification values computed for this category.

governments.subtitle: Add every government and its shipping fee. Saving replaces the full government fees list.
governments.shippingFeesRequired: Shipping fees must be zero or more.
